CustomField.description: If selected, a keyword search using the School input field will not search the parsed Education School 1 and Education School 2 fields on the Contact record. The School Name on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If selected, a keyword search using the School input field will not search the parsed Education School 1 and Education School 2 fields on the Contact record. The School Name on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.label: Disable Parsed School fields
